title: Dangote Cement Promotes Sustainable Shift in Africa’s Distribution Value Chain … invests in low-carbon logistics and digital transformation - FinancialEDGE
description: Dangote Cement Plc has once again demonstrated its lead in driving sustainable transformation across Sub-Saharan Africa’s cement value chain, with its Group Managing Director, Mr Arvind Pathak, reaffirming the company’s commitment to innovation and responsible growth at the 14th Africa CemTrade Summit in Accra, Ghana.
